name: Brain MRI Stroke Protocol
description: Dedicated brain MRI protocol for evaluation of acute stroke including DWI, PWI, and MRA

findings.technique: Stroke protocol MRI including DWI, ADC mapping, perfusion-weighted imaging, MRA of head and neck, and T2/FLAIR sequences.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Diffusion-Weighted Imaging
sections.content: Diffusion-weighted images demonstrate [no restricted diffusion / acute infarction in the left/right distribution]. The lesion measures approximately [X cm] and involves the [anterior circulation / posterior circulation / territory].

sections.name: Apparent Diffusion Coefficient
sections.content: The ADC map demonstrates [corresponding low ADC / restricted diffusion] in the region of abnormal DWI signal. This is [consistent with acute infarction / artifactual].

sections.name: Perfusion-Weighted Imaging
sections.content: Perfusion-weighted imaging demonstrates [no perfusion deficit / mismatch pattern / Tmax delay] in the [affected territory / penumbral region]. The penumbra is estimated at [X] mL.

sections.name: T2 and FLAIR
sections.content: T2 and FLAIR sequences demonstrate [no hyperintensity / hyperintensity in the affected region] consistent with [acute changes / subacute infarction].

sections.name: Intracranial MRA
sections.content: MR angiography of the intracranial arteries demonstrates [no occlusion / no stenosis / patent vessels]. The [MCA / PCA / ICA / basilar] is [patent / shows truncation].

sections.name: Extracranial MRA
sections.content: MR angiography of the neck demonstrates [no significant stenosis / no occlusion / normal bilateral carotid and vertebral arteries]. The cervical carotids are [patent / show mild disease].

sections.name: SWI
sections.content: Susceptibility-weighted images demonstrate [no microhemorrhage / no hemorrhage / no CMBs]. No hemosiderin staining.

sections.name: Vascular
sections.content: The venous sinuses are patent. No dural venous sinus thrombosis.

sections.name: Other Findings
sections.content: No mass, hemorrhage, or other acute process unrelated to the acute infarct.

impression:
1. MRI brain with acute stroke protocol.
2. [Acute infarction involving X territory] with [mismatch pattern / no significant penumbra] on perfusion.
3. [Patent / occluded] [vessel name] on MRA.
author: RadReport Templates
